steps: Go to https://www.avalara.com/us/en/index.html and click 'Free trial' to register a sandbox account
Fill in your name, email, and company information; select 'API & Custom Integration' as your use case
Complete email verification to activate your account
Log in to the sandbox admin portal at https://sandbox.admin.avalara.com
Navigate to Settings > License and API Keys
Click 'Generate license key' to create your credentials
Note your Account ID (displayed on the settings page) and the generated License Key
Encode 'AccountID:LicenseKey' in Base64 and use the result as the Basic auth value in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Authorization (Base64 AccountID:LicenseKey)
credential_fields.description: Base64-encoded string of 'AccountID:LicenseKey', used as a Basic auth value in the Authorization header. Encode your credentials with: echo -n 'ACCOUNT_ID:LICENSE_KEY' | base64

notes: Sandbox environment is at https://sandbox-rest.avatax.com — production is https://rest.avatax.com
Use a different email address for sandbox vs production to keep environments separate
License key is shown only once at generation — save it immediately
AvaTax requires a paid subscription for production; the sandbox is free for development and testing
The Account ID is a numeric value found in Settings > License and API Keys in the admin portal

test_endpoint.description: Ping the AvaTax API to verify connectivity and that credentials are valid
